steps.title: Square both sides
steps.content:
Start with the given equation.
$$r=\sqrt{8w-3}$$
Square both sides to remove the radical.
$$r^2=8w-3$$

steps.title: Isolate the variable
steps.content:
Add $3$ and divide by $8$.
$$r^2+3=8w$$
$$w=\frac{r^2+3}{8}=\frac{r^2}{8}+\frac{3}{8}$$
The answer is C.
